title: Mugann
description: Dark academic blocks to suit your sinister studies
body:
Mugann is a decoration mod for the dark academic in you. Current features:

- Grimoires: Slab-sized books coming in vertical and horizontal variants. Our T&C forbids you from reading them. Sorry.
- Hypothetical Dharmakirtian: An unreal, non-substantial block that mimics the properties of form-deprived fields. Experience nothing without the danger of nothing!
- Hyperthetical Dharmakirtian: It's like the previous one but you can't go inside. It's also technically real-er than its surroundings, but don't let that dissuade you from building something beautiful with it.
- Carpets, Rugs and Wallpapers with an antiquated flavor.
